user.title: Lemonade Server
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your local Lemonade Server.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Lemonade Server.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Lemonade Server is already configured.

missing_capability.title: Lemonade Server missing {capability} model capability
missing_capability.description: No downloaded Lemonade Server model advertises the {capability} capability in /v1/models. Install or expose a model with the required capability label, then reload the integration.
